center.name: 谷地
center.summary: 谷地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Crested cuckoo-dove、Black-headed tody-flycatcher、黑菲比霸鶲等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Rather, it borders the mountains and is occasionally found in the valleys between the Colombian cordilleras. This flycatcher is a tree-dwelling species, that sticks to the canopy and edges of humid forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crested cuckoo-dove is endemic to the Solomon Islands archipelago, where it is found in valleys on the islands of Bougainville, Choiseul, Santa Isabel, Kolombangara, New Georgia, Vangunu, Nggatokae, Rendova, Guadalcanal, Malaita, Makira, Three Sisters, and Ugi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Their main habitats are woodlands, forests, lakeshores, beaches, fields, valley bottoms, and rocky shores. It is commonly found in small flocks of 6 to 20 in and around the forest, and never in the open land. Can be commonly found in protected areas in national parks around Chile and Argentina. They are found in protected areas where the conditions support proper living and breeding

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Oregon it is found in river valleys on the Pacific coast, and in California on the western side of Coast Ranges
